programmes.show_description: In reverse: Starting in 2015, we're going back 35 years with timeless, soft rock tracks & big power ballads!
Kicking off your week with the finest in Soft Metal! From Aerosmith, Bon Jovi and Foreigner to Bonnie Tyler, Heart and Meatloaf.
From 1994 to 2022 - 1 hour of the biggest rock songs from the Red Hot Chili Peppers!
30 years & 4 hours of classic rock bands, in order from 1965-1995! Expect to see The Stones, The Who, Joan Jett, Aerosmith, AC/DC, Queen, Genesis & The Beatles.
The 30 greatest rock drummers in the world! These are Nicky's hardest hitters featuring Dave Grohl, Tommy Lee, Keith Moon, Ginger Baker, John Bonham but who is his Number 1?
Starting in the 00s, bow before the royal rock stage! Home to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced!
A definitive 6 hour marathon of 90s guitar anthems! From U2 to INXS, Blur to Bon Jovi, Skunk Anansie to Green Day, Metallica to Iron Maiden - 70 rock classics are here, in order!
From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!
In many people's opinion Queen are the greatest British band in the world! Sit back and enjoy as we play their biggest hits back to back!
From our sister channel NOW 80s T'Pau's Carol Decker brings a bit of Heart & Soul to a countdown of 80s ladies who liked to rock! With Joan Jett, Stevie Nicks & Pat Benatar.
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!
These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!
Over the years their credibility has been questioned, but their singalong potential was never in doubt! These are the 80s songs that built cities out of Rock'n'Roll!
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
Rock & Roll started as a rebellion and Nicky Horne brings you the 25 people who pushed all the boundaries & refused to conform! These are greatest Rock Rebels of all time!
From INXS & James at the start of the decade to U2 & Blondie at the end - these are 2 hours of feelgood rock'n'roll anthems from the 1990s.
From 2013 to 2022 - 40 minutes of the biggest rock songs from The 1975!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
In order, 20 of the biggest american anthems from the 21st Century featuring The Killers, Bon Jovi, Nickleback and One Republic.
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Starting in 2001, here are the biggest rock songs from Linkin Park!
Alex Baker brings you his 50 biggest 00s anthems! Expect everything from Green Day to Muse, Linkin Park to the Arctic Monkeys with the tunes getting bigger and louder as we go!
In reverse: Starting in 2015, we're going back 35 years with the power ladies who really rock! Expect Pink, Hayley Williams, Sheryl Crow, Bonnie Tyler and many more!
